title: Support `compose` as a podman command for better Docker CLI compatibility
body:
/kind feature

I'm increasingly running across build scripts that assume the built-in command `docker compose` exists (instead of the standalone `docker-compose` program). Podman does not work out of the box in these contexts, and a simple alias or symlink like provided by the `podman-docker` package is insufficient to attain compatibility, even when things would otherwise work.

Would it be possible to support invoking `podman compose` directly?

comments.body: Gah, thank you so much for finding the duplicate. Tried to search but the many other mentions of "compose" in issues caused me to miss it. :)
